chat_template:
{% for message in messages %}{% if message['role'] == 'user' %}{{ 'User: ' + message['content'] + '
' }}{% elif message['role'] == 'assistant' %}{% if loop.last %}{{ 'Assistant: ' + message['content']}}{% else %}{{ 'Assistant: ' + message['content'] + eos_token + '
' }}{% endif %}{% elif message['role'] == 'system' %}{{ message['content'] + '
' }}{% endif %}{% endfor %}{% if add_generation_prompt and messages[-1]['role'] != 'assistant' %}{{ 'Assistant:' }}{% endif %}
